ol.li: x86 Implementation: lock cmpxchg16b is the standard for 128-bit atomic updates.
ARM Implementation: Use ldrex/strex monitor loops or C11 memory_order_release.
Backoff Strategy: Exponential backoff using _mm_pause (x86) or yield (ARM) prevents MESI thrashing.

g.text: Sentinel Node Layout (Bucket Header) sizeof=16 bytes
Regular Node Layout (Data Element) sizeof=32 bytes

ul.li: Guarantees regular nodes sort after bucket sentinels.

div.p: c #define HM_SO_KEY_REGULAR_BIT ((uint64_t)1 << 63) #define HM_IS_REGULAR(node) (((node)->so_key & HM_SO_KEY_REGULAR_BIT) != 0) #define HM_IS_SENTINEL(node) (((node)->so_key & HM_SO_KEY_REGULAR_BIT) == 0)

text.tspan: T2: Thread 2 pops A, pops B
